Title: Recipes For Life
Author: Laura Hauser
Description: Every recipe is made and tested in my own kitchen using the same tools most families have. I rewrite instructions until they're clear, adjust ingredients until they make sense, and update posts whenever I find a better method. If a recipe feels impractical, stressful, or wasteful - it simply doesn't make it onto the site.

Title: All Recipes – Pastrywiz.com
Author: Pastry Wiz
Description: PastryWiz has been a baking and pastry reference on the web since 1997 — one of the original recipe sites of the early internet. At the PastryWiz Food Resource Center you will find 1000's of pages of food related information both for the professional and the consumer.

Title: Recipes – Cooking Index
Author: Cooking Index
Description: Cooking Index first went online in 1998 and was the brainchild of Randy Hoelscher and Mary Jane Johnson, who ran the site from their Minnesota home. In 2006 Cooking Index was transferred to Joe Saumarez Smith, who runs the site as a hobby from his home. Randy and Mary Jane now live in their RV and have a website about their travels called Food Freeway.
